refnamediv.refpurpose: Compute the rows and columns of a matrix of subplots

listitem.para: a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, the number of plots
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, greater than 1, the required ratio n/m (default f=4/3)
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, the number of rows in the subplot
a 1-by-1 matrix of doubles, integer value, the number of columns in the subplot

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Computes the number of rows and columns to plot p graphics in a m-by-n subplot.
These values of m and n should make so that the screen is correctly occupied by the plots. On output, the ratio n/m is as close as possible to f.
The default value of f corresponds to 4/3 screens. For 16/9 screens, we may use f=16/9.

refsection.title: Examples
